rulings.Case Title: BRENDA RAMERIZ VS. ALICE KAO AKA ALICE CHUNG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, August 18, 2010, line 1. COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT ALICE KAO'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is off calendar. Proof of service shows that moving party only served the client and not opposing counsel. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS ROBERTS VS. EDUARDO PANIAGUA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compelling Arbitration And Staying X-Action By X-Defts Thomas Roberts;
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, August 18, 2010, line 4. CROSS DEFENDANT THOMAS ROBERTS'S Motion For An Order Compelling Arbitration And Staying Cross-Action is granted. The Court stays prosecution of the cross-complaint and compels arbitration of those claims. Roberts to prepare order and statement of decistion if one is requested.=(302/CWW)
